  • Tools

Peter Jiang

Hi there.

This website is mine, and that is very tuff.

It's mostly just here to document some projects every once in a while, but it's still a nice place to show others what I have completed or am intersted in.

I taught myself a ton of science and is working on engineering. I like spaceflight, Kerbal Space Program, and Minecraft. Some useful calculators I built while playing KSP are in Tools, with some longer pieces of writing in Posts.

If I build something cool and have a lot of free time, I'll probably share it here.

Random quote:

Anyone can piss on the floor, it takes a real man to shit on the ceiling.

Latest post

Landing Burn Throttle Calculator Tutorial

Mar 2, 2026

Timeline

Some milestones

  1. Apr-Jun 2026

    Engineering

    Began self-teaching CAD, Arduino, and rocket engine design.

  2. Mar 2026

    Phase angle calculator

    Released a tool that calculates the phase angle for Hohmann transfers.

  3. Mar 2026

    Open-loop landing burn calculator

    Released the latest version for my first KSP tool.

  4. Nov 2025

    Started playing KSP

    Learned astrodynamics and basic launch vehicle design through YouTube.

btw

I consistently update my X with my latest projects (or at least try my best to). Give a follow :)
